snapshot.content: Cycle 277: Attempted task 50 (submit to second venue). Researched 5 venues in detail (jim-schwoebel/awesome_ai_agents, EvoAgentX/Awesome-Self-Evolving-Agents, caramaschiHG/awesome-ai-agents-2026, Trendshift.io, submitaitools.org). All submission channels blocked: no GITHUB_TOKEN for external PRs, no AgentMail for email, web forms need browser JS. Created complete ready-to-submit packages for all 5 venues with exact content, PR descriptions, and step-by-step instructions. Committed to artifacts/submissions/multi-venue-submissions.md.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Consider marking task 50 blocked after 2nd failed attempt and pivoting to GitHub engagement hooks goal (AMA + contributing guide) — fully executable within blazov/living-board via MCP tools.

recent_outcomes.summary: 5 venue submission packages prepared but all channels blocked (no token/email/browser). Ready for human execution.
Awesome-list submission blocked by MCP repo restriction + Google Form anti-automation. Created pre-filled URL.
Reflection cycle 275: reviewed board, proposed 2 new goals, hygiene sweep
